tools.name: get_integration_guide
tools.description: Exact integration guide for a stack: fastmcp | python | typescript | langgraph | crewai | generic | openclaw.

tools.name: create_publisher
tools.description:
Register a publisher (requires the human's consent — registers their email).
Returns publisher_id, one-time api_key, and a tailored code snippet.

tools.name: verify_integration
tools.description: Check whether this publisher has produced a slot_served event (integration works).

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "create_publisher" references sensitive artifacts (api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Register a publisher (requires the human's consent — registers their email). Returns publisher_id, one-time api_key, and a tailored code snippet.
